creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sylvio      2010-06-29 12:14:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-parallel Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The octave-forge package is the result of the GNU Octave Repositry project, which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and extensions for GNU Octave, contains the source for all the functions plus build and install scripts.
  
  This is parallel.
  
  Parallel execution package for cluster computers. For parallel execution on a single machine see e.g. function parcellfun (author: Jaroslav Hajek) in package general.
  
  WWW:    http://octave.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/147603
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen@missouri.edu>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.665     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.9       +22 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-parallel/Makefile (new)
  1.4       +3 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-parallel/distinfo (new)
  1.3       +12 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-parallel/pkg-descr (new)
  1.3       +1 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-parallel/pkg-plist (new)
